title: The Long Work — A Terraria Chronicle
description: My first Terraria playthrough told as narrative fiction. A man arrives in an empty world with a bad pickaxe and no plan, and does what he always does: builds something.

title: What the phones taught me
description: Three months of outbound calls in a market I had never worked in. What I learned about healthcare, sales, and what happens when you stop pitching and start listening.
